query: My AI Agent's Code Tool errors with 'No execution data available' when I use $fromAI(). And it says wrong output type. Fix it.
expected_behavior: Identifies $fromAI() is NOT supported inside the toolCode sandbox
Says the Code Tool must return a STRING (JSON.stringify for structured data), not an array
Notes input arrives as query/_query and cannot be renamed
If $fromAI typed params or object returns are needed, routes to toolWorkflow instead of toolCode
